hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.metric_value: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-mono font-medium tracking-tight text-white

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (p-8, p-12) for Marketing; Dense (p-4, p-6) for Dashboard
layout.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Cards have h-full.
layout.marketing_grid: The 'Swiss Grid' - heavily asymmetrical, overlapping elements, grid-cols-12.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px) to maintain technical/authoritative feel

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout. Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border (border-white/10). No soft shadows.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header_nav: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.alert_banners: Retro-Futurism/Terminal: Deep black bg, stark 1px solid border matching alert color (e.g. border-red-500/50), monospace text.

components_strategy.marketing: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Raw sections. Avoid Shadcn Cards to ensure asymmetry. Use Marquee for live intelligence feed tickers.
components_strategy.dashboard: Shadcn UI, highly customized. Use Tables, Tabs, Select. Strip default radiuses (set to 0).
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn Chart components (Recharts). Use monochrome lines or strictly functional colors (Safe/Warning/Alert) with no gradients.
components_strategy.interactive: Hover states must explicitly set text color (hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white). Focus rings must be sharp, 1px solid white.

motion_interactions.hover: Instant background color shifts. No bouncy animations.
motion_interactions.data_feed: Use subtle Framer Motion staggered fade-ins for list items (itinerary, threat alerts).

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.

hero_background.description: Abstract blue topographic map. Usage: Landing page hero background with a heavy bg-black/70 overlay to ensure stark white text pops.

services_background.description: Satellite view of city at night. Usage: Threat Alerts or Services overview section background with dark overlay.

about_image.description: Silhouette of a man at airport with airplane reflections. Usage: 'About Us' or 'Traveler Monitoring' feature image, cropped strictly square or tall rectangle.

sponsor_logo_1.description: Minimalist logo placeholder for corporate partners. Apply grayscale and high contrast filters if needed.

iconography.style: Stroke width 1.5, strict geometry, no filled icons unless representing critical alarms.
iconography.usage: Use icons sparingly. Pair with monospace overlines for data labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme for both marketing and dashboard. The brand is 'Global Intel Desk' and the vibe is 'Geopolitical Briefing Room'.
Do NOT use 'Space Grotesk'. Stick to Chivo for headings, Inter for body, JetBrains Mono for data labels.

Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard: tight gaps (gap-4), 1px solid borders (border-white/10), flat #121212 backgrounds. Cards should not have shadows or large border radii (use rounded-none or rounded-sm).
For the hero section, use the provided hero_background image with a bg-black/70 to bg-black/80 overlay. Text must be highly legible.
Use color purely for functional status in the dashboard: White for neutral/primary, Amber/Red for alerts, Green for safe.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, and forms.
Ensure all components use Shadcn, but customize the CSS variables to match this strictly high-contrast, zero-radius tactical theme.
The Risk Assessment cards should utilize a Bento-style grid inside the dashboard.
Write components in .js/.jsx syntax instead of .tsx, as specified in the environment rules.
